channel.title: ABC Grandstand Sport
channel.copyright: Copyright 2026, Australian Broadcasting Corporation. All Rights Reserved.

item.title: Josh Hazlewood shines with ball in IPL victory
item.description: Josh Hazlewood has produced another masterful display in the IPL to rocket Royal Challengers Bengaluru back to the top of the league.

media:group.media:description: Josh Hazlewood has played a starring role for Royal Challengers Bengaluru in their win over Lucknow Super Giants.

item.title: Arsenal scrap through to semis, Munich win thriller over Real Madrid
item.description: Arsenal advance to the UEFA Champions League semifinals with a goalless draw, as Bayern Munich defeat Real Madrid.

media:group.media:description: Arsenal was not convincing, but it has advanced to the semifinals of the UEFA Champions League.

item.title: Phillip Island motoring festival proposed to fill MotoGP void
item.description: Phillip Island will host its last Australian MotoGP later this year, but the local community hopes a motoring festival could help fill the $29 million economic void.
item.dc:creator: Madeleine Stuchbery

media:group.media:description: Ideas are being discussed for an alternative motoring event at Phillip Island.

item.title: De Minaur suffers shock loss as Alcaraz withdraws from Barcelona Open
item.description: Alex de Minaur's uneven season has hit another road bump as Australia's number one succumbed to a shock last-16 loss at the Barcelona Open.

media:group.media:description: Alex de Minaur has suffered a surprising early exit from the Barcelona Open.

item.title: Kerr scores landmark goal as Matildas win FIFA Series
item.description: Sam Kerr's 75th international goal has helped the Matildas to a surprisingly tough, controversial 2-0 victory over Kenya in the FIFA Series final.

media:group.media:description: The Matildas have added the FIFA Series trophy to their accolades after defeating Kenya.

item.title: Henderson 'content' knowing her epic reign will not last forever
item.description: Rebecca Henderson has won 13 elite national mountain bike cross-country titles in a row and, this season, is unbeaten in the UCI Oceania Continental series, which concludes this weekend at the Cairns Rainforest Rumble.
item.dc:creator: Simon Smale

media:group.media:description: Rebecca Henderson will head to the 2026 World Cup having had a solid block of racing domestically already this season.

item.title: Power confirms appeal after reasons released for Butters AFL Tribunal decision
item.description: The AFL Tribunal releases its reasons for finding Zak Butters guilty of abusive and insulting language to umpire Nick Foot, saying it was "satisfied to the requisite standard" that he had made the remarks and that it was "implausible" that the umpire would have made it up.

media:group.media:description: Port Adelaide's Zak Butters (left) and Ollie Wines were left stunned after umpire Nick Foot gave a 50-metre penalty for abusive language in the Gather Round finale.

item.title: Moana Pasifika to leave Super Rugby at end of season
item.description: Citing financial, operational, and strategic barriers that have made continuing unviable, battling Super Rugby Pacific outfit Moana Pasifika reveal they will disband at season's end.

media:group.media:description: After five seasons in Super Rugby Pacific, the Moana Pasifika team will be disbanded at the end of the season.

item.title: Collard hearing leaves no winners as queer community further bruised
item.description: Lance Collard is handed a monster suspension after being found guilty of using a homophobic slur in the first AFL disciplinary hearing.
item.dc:creator: Marnie Vinall

media:group.media:description: St Kilda's Lance Collard was found guilty of using a homophobic slur during a VFL match this year.

item.title: PSG, AtlÃ©tico Madrid into Champions League semis as injury deals France World Cup blow
item.description: Paris Saint-Germain and AtlÃ©tico Madrid advance to the last four of the Champions League, as Liverpool's rough season continues with a key injury that deals a blow to France's World Cup chances.

media:group.media:description: Ousmane DembÃ©lÃ© scored twice in the rain at Anfield to complete a 4-0 aggregate Champions League win for his PSG side over Liverpool.

item.title: FIFA provides more expensive World Cup tickets after backlash over prices
item.description: After a backlash over ticket prices, FIFA puts up a new option for fans â€” and it is even more expensive.

media:group.media:description: FIFA president Gianni Infantino has approved more expensive tickets at the World Cup despite a backlash.

item.title: Usyk calls kickboxer Verhoeven a dangerous opponent ahead of unlikely title fight
item.description: World heavyweight boxing champion Oleksandr Usyk says it is time to do what he wants ahead of his title bout against a kickboxer who has only had one boxing fight.

media:group.media:description: Oleksandr Usyk and Rico Verhoeven will have a world title fight at the Pyramids in Egypt in May.

item.title: NFL reporter resigns days after photos with Patriots coach published
item.description: The Athletic's NFL reporter Dianna Russini resigns despite denying anything untoward in photos with Patriots coach Mike Vrabel.

media:group.media:description: Dianna Russini interviews Detroit's Jared Goff after a game on Christmas Day in 2025.

item.title: Cameron Green suffers IPL nightmare with bat and ball
item.description: Cameron Green has suffered another challenging outing in the Indian Premier League as he struggles to live up to his tag as the most expensive overseas player.

media:group.media:description: Cameron Green went for 30 off his two overs as Kolkata Knight Riders lost to the Chennai Super Kings in the IPL.

item.title: Collard handed monster ban over 'entirely unacceptable' homophobic slur
item.description: St Kilda forward Lance Collard is suspended after a marathon AFL Tribunal hearing with a deliberation of over 90 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Chris De Silva and Marnie Vinall

media:group.media:description: Lance Collard was handed a nine-week suspension for his use of a homophobic slur in the VFL.

item.title: Butters asked 'why did you pay that?' Koch says
item.description: Port Adelaide chairman David Koch says the AFL club will back Zak Butters "to the hilt" amid dispute over what was said to an umpire during Sunday night's loss against St Kilda.
item.dc:creator: Briana Fiore

media:group.media:description: Port Adelaide midfielder Zak Butters was referred to the AFL Tribunal.

item.title: Butters found guilty of abusing umpire as Port claims 'glaring hole in the evidence'
item.description: Port Adelaide star Zak Butters is found guilty of umpire abuse at the AFL Tribunal, despite strongly denying allegations he asked umpire Nick Foot "how much are they paying you?".
item.dc:creator: Dean Bilton

media:group.media:description: Zak Butters continues to deny he made the alleged remarks to umpire Nick Foot.

item.title: Aussie duo picked in WNBA draft as Fudd goes first overall
item.description: Saffron Shiels and Manuela Puoch continue the influx of Australians at the WNBA draft as Dallas pairs Azzi Fudd with her college teammate Paige Bueckers.Â

media:group.media:description: Saffron Shiels (pictured) will team up with Opals coach Sandy Brondello on the Toronto Tempo.Â

item.title: Tornado forces Wallaroos to take refuge inside US hotel
item.description: The Wallaroos' preparations for the Pacific Four Series are dealt an unexpected blow as a warning alarm sounds inside the team hotel in Kansas City.

media:group.media:description: Australia's players were forced to take shelter inside their hotel in Kansas City as a tornado approached.

item.title: How the AFL's gamble with conflict of interest concerns didn't pay off
item.description: The AFL gambled that concerns over a conflict of interest with one of its umpires wouldn't be an issue, but that call has come back to bite them â€” and it's not the umpire's fault.
item.dc:creator: Kyle Pollard

media:group.media:description: AFL umpire Nick Foot has been left between a rock and hard place in being allowed to retain his place as a Sportsbet racing analyst.

item.title: IPL part-ownership possible for Big Bash clubs
item.description: Cricket Australia will know in the coming days if the states are happy to privatise their Big Bash League clubs, a call that may see them become part-owned by Indian Premier League franchises.

media:group.media:description: Big Bash League champions Perth could go into their next title defence as a privatised franchise.

item.title: How this Wests Tigers cult hero went from meme to machine
item.description: For years, Alex Twal was best known for the things he didn't do but, after helping the Tigers surge up the ladder, the cult hero forward has become one of the most improved players in the NRL.
item.dc:creator: Nick Campton

media:group.media:description: In his 10th season of first grade, Twal is playing the best football of his life.

item.title: Super Netball expansion delayed as TV talks drag on
item.description: Two new teams were expected to join the league in 2027 to make Super Netball a 10-team competition, but slow broadcast negotiations are holding up the process.Â
item.dc:creator: Brittany Carter

media:group.media:description: A Newcastle Knights bid backed by Wests Group has already submitted plans to council to build a high-performance netball training hub in Mayfield.

item.title: Starc honoured as Wisden slams England's 'feckless' Ashes
item.description: Australia's Ashes ace Mitchell Starc is named the leading men's cricketer of the year by the Wisden Cricketers' Almanack after taking 55 wickets in 2025.Â

media:group.media:description: Mitchell Starc's dominant Ashes performance has been rewarded with Wisden naming him the leading men's cricketer of the year.

item.title: Why Gout's incredible run deserves equal measures of praise and patience
item.description: Gout Gout was on the lips of every athletics fan across the globe on the weekend, but elements of his record-breaking run need to be treated with caution.Â
item.dc:creator: Simon Smale

media:group.media:description: Gout Gout's incredible 200m run on the weekend has firmly placed him as one of the most exciting running prospects on the planet.
